item.name: Rummy-nosed Tetra
item.description:
A crimson-faced wavekin which has found a home in the Font of Maya.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 1 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: A tropical fish boasting a striped tail and bright scarlet scales at its fore. It is said to have once been a monk, nose rouged with drink, who tripped into the Font of Maya and was summarily reincarnated─which, given the number of tetra to be found there, does raise questions about the frequency of such occurrences.
